entities.name: SESBANIA BISPINOSA
entities.description: A legume weed found in rice growing areas of Kamarajar District, Tamilnadu

entities.name: RHIZOBIUM
entities.description: Bacteria isolated from Sesbania bispinosa and tested for nitrogenase activity

entities.name: KAMARAJAR DISTRICT
entities.description: A district in Tamilnadu where the study plants were collected

entities.name: TAMILNADU
entities.description: The state in India where the study was conducted

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop grown in the areas where Sesbania bispinosa was found

entities.name: NITROGENASE ACTIVITY
entities.description: A measure of the ability of rhizobia to fix nitrogen

entities.name: NODULATION
entities.description: The process of forming nodules on plant roots, used to select positive rhizobium isolates

entities.name: DMB R 001
entities.description: A highly positive rhizobium isolate selected for further study

entities.name: DMB R 002
entities.description: A highly positive rhizobium isolate selected for further study

entities.name: PH
entities.description: A climatic factor studied for its effect on the growth of rhizobium strains

entities.name: TEMPERATURE
entities.description: A climatic factor studied for its effect on the growth of rhizobium strains

entities.name: SALINITY
entities.description: A climatic factor studied for its effect on the growth of rhizobium strains

entities.name: NITROGEN
entities.description: The element (N2) harvested by rhizobium strains for legumes in soil

entities.name: SCREENING
entities.description: The process of evaluating rhizobium isolates for specific traits

entities.name: ISOLATION
entities.description: The process of extracting rhizobia from the roots of Sesbania bispinosa

entities.name: IN VITRO
entities.description: The laboratory environment in which the growth of rhizobia was studied
